title: 5cm Braided Knot Balls for Puppy Toys - Washable Dog Chew Toys & Ropes for Interactive Play, Durable, Boredom, Puppies Teething Relief (Pack of 3)
features: 【PUPPY DOG ROPE BALL】With dia of 5 cm(2") and in 2 Colours (Mint & Yellow), these puppy teething toys Dog Balls are suitable for puppies. Rope Dog Balls keep your pets happy, healthy and always entertained.

【DOG ROPE TOY FOR PUPPIES】Interactive and varied, these rope dog toys, are very easy to attract pup's attention and allow you to interact with the dog. Some interactive games help you build a better friendship.
【WHAT IS IT MADE OF?】Each ropes balls toys for dogs is made from 100% Cotton (Durable braided material) and is non-toxic, washable, easy to use and environmental-friendly.
【PUPPY TEETHING TOYS】These kind of Rope Dog Balls can play a protective role and clean teeth while chewing. These balls for Dogs put less pressure on Dogs Teeth as compared to other Tough Dog Toys.

【PUPPY ESSENTIALS】Ideal as puppy chews as their new teeth grow up, bite furniture to relieve discomfort and this ball could be a great alternative as a Bite-Resistant. This puppy toy can relieve boredom and pressure and make them happy.
description: Product description KNOT BALLS FOR DOGS / ROPE DOG TOY / CHEW TOYS FOR DOGS PUPPIES FEATURES Set of Dog Rope Toys Hard & Strong Dog Chew Ball Braided Ideal Puppy Accessories Cotton Dog Ball Durable Bite-Resistant Healthy Teeth Helps during Dog Teething Dog Teething toys PACKAGE INCLUDES 3 X Puppy Balls WARNING This is a Dog Toy Only and not meant for chewing (Swallowing) Playtime should always be supervised. Not for Strong & Aggressive Chewers Directions This is a Dog Toy Ball and meant for Dog use.
